textByHashes.94ee3a0b9106201bc1a92e2352806defafd7c1f3: I don't have time to talk to an outerlander.
textByHashes.5060651064266fb60fa1b41e930d846e6f4ae65a: Good to see you . Wanting to go to the Island of Stone?
textByHashes.0f123447d122c046485b7f95a232382cbeb92747: Good to see you . Do you wish to return to Rellekka?
